schema.name: Operatorology.TriadPack.TuyCut_HZSO_Phantom
notes: Conceptual training artifact: a triad pipeline combining selection (Tuy's Cut), validation (HZSO), and invariance-preserving evolution (Phantom).
Includes an 'epic' Phantom semantics: defensive invariance and optional bounded fault injection into a designated adversarial channel.
Not advice for misuse; treat offensive injection as controlled research in adversarial robustness only.

triad.role: Validity selector (cuts away infeasible branches, chooses low-Height feasible state).
Symmetry validator + gate (Height≈0 implies consistency with base law S0).
Invariance-preserving adaptation (commutator) + optional bounded adversarial injection on a target channel.

pipeline.ascii: O_stable = O_phantom o O_HZSO o O_TuyCut

height.meaning: Non-negative deviation from base symmetry/law S0; H=0 iff x ∈ S0.

phantom.ascii: O_phantom = B^-1 o A^-1 o B o A
meaning: Offensive (bounded): inject a controlled perturbation into an adversarial channel while keeping self stable.

operators.name: Tuy's Cut Operator — Validity Selector
properties: Prefers feasible candidates (Height≤eps and constraints satisfied).
Among feasible, minimizes Height; ties broken by smaller movement.

operators.name: Height-Zero Symmetry Operator (HZSO)
capabilities: Gate: accept if Height≤eps and constraints satisfied.
Optional projection toward Height≈0 using finite-difference gradient descent.

operators.name: Phantom Operator — Commutator (Epic Mode)
capabilities: Defensive commutator on self state x (approx invariance).
Optional bounded injection into a specified channel (e.g., 'opp') for adversarial robustness research.
safety: Keep injection bounded and within controlled evaluation settings.
Use for robustness testing / adversarial training, not for malicious deployment.

training_recipes.name: Robust training loop (conceptual)
steps: Apply Tuy's Cut to choose a valid candidate state.
Use HZSO gate; if not OK, project toward Height≈0.
Apply Phantom (defense) to stabilize while probing perturbations.
Optionally enable bounded injection on an adversarial channel during evaluation to measure robustness.
success_criteria: Height after triad remains near zero (within eps).
Robustness improves against bounded perturbations without catastrophic drift.
